## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Send message '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages or logs.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- LLM Provider: [e.g. anthropic / moonshot]
- AGENTR version / commit: [e.g. 0.1.0 / abc1234]

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
